programme.title: Just Kidding: Elephant in the Box
programme.desc: Four season rain shower, Hidden face in the couch and more hilarious pranks.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags: Penmanship Trouble
programme.desc: The big laughs are coming your way with the gold standard of hidden camera shows: The Just For Laughs Gags! Enjoy tons of priceless, jaw-dropping moments as passersby get pranked in our zaniest, most ridiculous situations yet!

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags: Full of Whipped Cream
programme.desc: Sit back and get ready to laugh with Just for Laughs Gags! in this episode features pranks where whipped cream comes out of his ears and Jesus resurrecting a trout. Sit back and enjoy over a dozen of the world's funniest pranks.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags: Spermatozoids
programme.desc: Sit back and get ready to laugh with Just for Laughs Gags! In this episode features pranks such as the driving dog and missile in an elevator. Sit back and enjoy over a dozen of the world's funniest pranks.

programme.title: Just Kidding: Footballer in a Shell
programme.desc: Clown spins juice glasses, Steamer melts jewelry and many more kids playing pranks.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags: Quarreling Newlyweds
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh out loud with Just for Laughs Gags! In this episode features quarreling newlyweds and an ejecting dish tray. Sit back and enjoy over a dozen of the world's funniest pranks.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Pack Leaders in Training
programme.desc: Cesar has always believed that kids are more receptive to his training methods than most adults. He flies two lucky young fans to California so they can become "Dog Whisperers" in training!

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Chloe, Gotti and Madison
programme.desc: A Border Collie/Greyhound mix develops dog aggression; an inherited pooch who was raised "Cesar's Way" loses his confidence; and 150 pound Leonberger, Madison, is like a bull in a china shop.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: A Lack of Vision, Wound Up Rottie, Attack of the Peek-a-Poo
programme.desc: Cody, a blind Yorkshire terrier, is overly protective. Rottweiler Buffy has a dangerous obsession with the horses. Peek-a-Poo puppy Chloe, growls, snaps, and bites to get her way.
programme.sub-title: A Lack of Vision, Wound Up Rottie, Attack of the Peek-a-Poo

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Ellie & J.J. and Oscar
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, star of Expedition Wild, and wife, actress Missi Pyle, seek help with their dog’s aggression toward other dogs. A rescued stray needs help conquering his fear of children.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anti-Social Sasha
programme.desc: Sasha, a pound pup, is perfect in the house, but outside she shows aggression towards other dogs. Angler, a Lab, is blind, and exhibits strange behavior around food.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Slick & Pepper
programme.desc: Slick, a rare white Puli, is full of phobias. When clients come to Christopher’s photography studio, they are greeted by Pepper’s annoying barking and heel nipping.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar explains how he reads a dog's energy and body language as he deals with two Jack Russell terriers who grew up together but fight violently.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cujo and Molly
programme.desc: Both Mary Jane and her lab-mastiff mix, Cujo, get help tackling their challenges. And Jack Russell mix Molly learns to adapt to her working environment.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Tigger and Dan
programme.desc: Cesar comes in to help twins with their biting Chihuahua-Pomeranian mix. A Labrador retriever quickly takes to training to become a hunting dog but has a growing aggressive streak.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Tyson, Moose, and Rylie & Tucker
programme.desc: Model Kim Strother is in desperate need of rescuing. Her Yorkshire Terrier Moose is a menace to society. when they go for walks, barking and biting at passersby and their dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Stella & Nala and Phoebe
programme.desc: A couple with a shared love for dogs and the outdoors tries to broker peace between their two dogs. Cesar must help with a rescue dog’s fear of men.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Nightmare in Central Park, Bad Boy Baxter
programme.desc: Curly, an adopted lab-greyhound mix, is aggressive with other dogs. Rhodesian Ridgeback/Boxer mix Baxter is rescued after wandering the streets but has severe dog aggression.
programme.sub-title: Nightmare in Central Park, Bad Boy Baxter

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Special: 100th Episode Celebration
programme.desc: Participants from more than 200 stories featured on Dog Whisperer parade down the red carpet to celebrate the 100th Episode of Dog Whisperer with Cesar Millan.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Viper and Diesel
programme.desc: Viper, a trained K9 detection dog is unable to enter a prison because of his fear of strangers. Family dog, Diesel, took a turn for the worse when his canine companion, Chopper, passed away.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Buddy: Red Alert
programme.desc: Pit Bull Buddy, was found chained and starving to death and was very aggressive. Rufus, a Rottweiler/Shar Pei mix, has bitten five people. Both need to get their aggression under control.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Lives Changed
programme.desc: In this special episode, Cesar revisits some of the incredible Dog Whisperer stories of the past four years and shares his reactions to the changes in the lives of these special packs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anger Management
programme.desc: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Opie & Flirt
programme.desc: Black lab mix Opie is a charmer around people, but frighteningly aggressive around other dogs. Energetic to the point of being neurotic, Chinese Crested Flirt cannot sit still for one moment.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Miles and Maxie & Booker
programme.desc: Former Guns N’ Roses drummer, Matt Sorum need help controlling his ten month old French bulldog Miles’ aggression. And then, can Cesar clear the name of a dog who killed its sibling?

programme.title: Baywatch: Father's Day
programme.desc: Mitch receives a mysterious package his father had put together before he died. Mitch and his father never saw eye-to-eye, but this gift impacts Mitch more than he ever thought possible. Logan visits a hypnotist to deal with a past trauma.

programme.title: Baywatch: Fire With Fire
programme.desc: Andy, an old friend of Mitch, visits Baywatch to complete four days of lifeguard service in order to remain on the active roster. But Andy's strong-arm tactics do not sit well with the other lifeguards.

programme.title: Baywatch: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: Matt and CJ stumble upon a homeless man who shockingly turns out to be someone they know very well. Meanwhile, Mitch must rescue a boy's brother from drug smugglers so the boy can receive a life-saving transplant of his brother's bone marrow.

programme.title: Baywatch: Promised Land
programme.desc: When testing out a new flying machine, Mitch spots a makeshift raft with a stranded woman in it. Mitch must help the Chinese woman find her sister. Back at headquarters, Matt and Garner deal with a beach robbery scam.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Runaways
programme.desc: Prominent British businessman Richard Branson visits Baywatch to perform several risky stunts, putting the lifeguards on high alert. Meanwhile Mitch has to save one of Kaye's employees whose violent husband has come looking for her.

programme.title: Baywatch: Wet and Wild
programme.desc: Hobie is thrilled when the “Johnny Danger Stunt Show" comes to the beach, but Mitch finds Johnny has questionable morals and is worried Hobie may follow his example. Matt is accused of sexual harassment by bad girl lifeguard Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch: Trapped Beneath the Sea, Part 1
programme.desc: Mitch considers a new career working with Garner as a private eye. Logan cheats on Caroline again. The explosion of an offshore oil rig endangers Stephanie, Cody and Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch: Trapped Beneath the Sea, Part 2
programme.desc: As the crippled oil rig sinks and floods with water, Cody, Neely and Stephanie begin a desperate rescue effort to save the two young couples, and themselves, until the Baywatch lifeguards can arrive to help.

programme.title: Baywatch: Hot Stuff
programme.desc: Kaye Morgan asks Hobie to volunteer at a school for young blind children. Things take a dangerous turn when a huge brush fire traps Hobie and the blind children in the hills, and Mitch is the only one who can save them.

programme.title: Baywatch: Surf's Up
programme.desc: Caroline tries to stop her sister from making the worst mistake of her life. Cody and Neely rescue two surfers that fall ill due to a highly polluted beach. Mitch enlists the Beach Boys for a benefit concert to raise money to clean up the pollution.

programme.title: Baywatch: To Everything There is a Season
programme.desc: Mitch's mother arrives in town for a visit, and after some strange occurrences he insists she see a doctor. Meanwhile, Cody loses the motivation to continue his Olympic training and it is up to Stephanie to reinspire him.
programme.sub-title: To Everything There is a Season

programme.title: Baywatch: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: Stephanie, CJ, and Caroline go on a girls only junior lifeguard trip to Catalina which turns dire when two of the girls get trapped in a flooded cave. Meanwhile, a woman who dies in a car accident bequeaths an odd inheritance to Mitch…

programme.title: Baywatch: Face of Fear
programme.desc: Hobie's new friend Isaac is an angry kid who will do anything to get his father's attention. His risky behavior is a problem for the lifeguards. Meanwhile, Caroline meets a jockey who has lost the will to race after an accident.

programme.title: Baywatch: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Logan borrows Cody's car without permission and has an accident, then lies to the police. Meanwhile, the Baywatch team settles an internal dispute with a paintball war and C.J. takes in an injured sea lion, causing problems with her roommates.

programme.title: Baywatch: Home is Where the Heat is
programme.desc: Matt Brody returns to Baywatch and ends up trapped on a yacht with Neely when a group of ruthless pirates take hostages. Meanwhile, Joey's past may jeopardize her adoption by Mitch.
programme.sub-title: Home is Where the Heat is

programme.title: Baywatch: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Logan and Caroline’s relationship hits a new low when Caroline returns his engagement ring, but things change when a baby is left in Logan’s possession. Meanwhile, Cody must overcome yet another setback to his Olympic career.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Incident
programme.desc: Caroline blames herself for a teen's death in a fiery nighttime boating accident and goes through Critical Incident Stress. Pushing everyone away, Caroline begins partying to distract from her guilt. Can the team help her recover from her PTSD?

programme.title: Baywatch: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: A mysterious, unseen creature begins attacking beachgoers, and it is up to the Baywatch team to find the creature. Meanwhile, Inside Sports Magazine wants a lifeguard for their swimsuit issue. Neely and Caroline compete for the cover.

programme.title: Baywatch: Desperate Encounter
programme.desc: Logan must help his friend Carmen raise $50,000 to keep her ranch, and Jessie Lee Harris is back in town just in time to help. Mitch finds himself in a deadly race for justice during his vacation in Baja, Mexico.

programme.title: Baywatch: Baywatch Angels
programme.desc: Stephanie, Caroline and CJ become Charlie’s Angels in a fun fantasy romp through 70's television as they try and catch an escaped psychopath bent on killing lifeguards.

programme.title: Baywatch: Bash at the Beach
programme.desc: CJ rescues pro wrestler Hulk Hogan, who then tells the Baywatch team that he's in town with Randy Savage to try and prevent the closure of the Venice Boys' Youth Center. Hogan must take on Ric Flair in a cage match to prevent the closure.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When Cally and Annie have a falling out, Cally befriends Claudia, the cool new girl in school, but soon learns the hard way that her friendship was disastrously misplaced.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: As a result of rigorous testing Lance is chosen to become the newest recruit of Doyle’s secret society; Nemo attempts to escape Gamerz.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Cally follows Violet's example and dabbles in magic spells to regain Annie's friendship. But her popularity goes freakishly out of control.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When the Dark Oracle predicts Blaze will end his life at midnight, Lance and Cally attempt to make sure it doesn't happen. However, changes in Sage and Lance’s relationship complicate matters.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Lance is upset when Cally falls for Omen, the new boy in school, who Lance suspects is not what he seems.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When Cally destroys the comic book it has disastrous and unforeseen results.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Cally and Lance discover how “Dark Oracle” came into their lives and attempt to get rid of it once and for all.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Passage At Arms
programme.desc: A woman is found dead, but was it suicide or murder? A French fencing match provides the telling clue.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: A psychologist is stabbed to death in a seemingly sealed room. Inspector March must find who killed him and how did they accomplish the task.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Present Tense
programme.desc: Colonel March's niece, a believer in spiritualism, hears her dead husband's voice and becomes convinced he has returned as a ghost; but has he?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: At Night All Cats Are Gray
programme.desc: A lady claims an odd man is following her and fears for her life. She’s later found murdered...in mismatched color, a telling clue for the inspector.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Kidnapped Poodle
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a valuable stolen diamond as well as the kidnapping of a little boy's poodle; he thinks both incidents may be connected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Invisible Knife
programme.desc: March must solve the mystery of how a man could be stabbed to death by an invisible knife, while attempting to summon The Devil during a black rite.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Point of Destruction
programme.desc: Four tragic air accidents seem to point to the failure of a fuel diffuser being tested, but Peter suspects sabotage is at play.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Death Cell
programme.desc: An escaped mental patient comes to Peter, asking for his help in getting her fiancͩ cleared of a murder charge as he awaits execution.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Vanishing Evidence
programme.desc: A European spy kills a British professor and steals vital papers. M.I.5 recruits Peter to go to to Amsterdam and recover the scientific research.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Prize
programme.desc: In Scandinavia, at a prize-awarding ceremony, Peter must rescue a writer being held for speaking out against her repressive government.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Flight into Darkness
programme.desc: Dr. Stephens believes his anti-gravity research will endanger mankind; he destroys the papers and disappears. Brady is summoned to track him down.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Decoy
programme.desc: Identical twins Toni and Terry Trent are a popular musical act, performing for the troops on a USO tour of Britain. Brady volunteers to help Toni when Terry disappears at a Soho hotel where she had earlier witnessed a murder.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The White Rabbit
programme.desc: French authorities call Peter when a doctor brings in a white rabbit she says materialized out of thin air before her eyes.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre The Werewolf of Washington
programme.desc: While on assignment in Hungary, a young reporter is attacked by a mysterious animal. (1981)

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Voice
programme.desc: Young reporter Jared Corning travels to a small New England town to cover the trial of several local people accused of setting fire to a barn owned by unpopular Tom Goss. Jared finds it hard to believe that their aim was to kill a pet raccoon.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Legacy of Love
programme.desc: Two people are drawn to a remote town and to each other without explanation.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Rendezvous
programme.desc: A wife is notified that her husband, a Marine, has been lost at sea. However, she refuses to believe that he is dead and knows that he will return to her.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Executioner
programme.desc: In 1862, Confederate soldier Jess Bradley and his faithful dog are captured by a sadistic Union officer, Col. Martin. When Jess' dog is killed, forces from beyond began to take a strange revenge on the colonel.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Last Round
programme.desc: A prizefighter who has fallen on very hard times is visited by the ghost of a fellow boxer, who reminds him of a terrifying old legend that may well come true.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Dead Man's Tale
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck newsman, Phillip Werris, checks into a flea-bag hotel with his wife Jan, where he finds a manual on how to prospect for gold.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Sacred Mushroom
programme.desc: Newland and his associates visit a remote Mexican village to determine if eating a rare mushroom can enhance one's extrasensory perception capacities.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Gift
programme.desc: It's May in England and a Gypsy fortuneteller and her rakish son set to work rooking a gullible public. But when the phony fortuneteller actually receives the gift of clairvoyance she has long prayed for, she is startled by what she sees.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Person Unknown
programme.desc: In Mexico, an escaped convict hides out in a monastery. Unfortunately, it is on the night when the ghost of an Aztec warrior is said to roam the halls. When a murder is discovered later that night, he must prove that he didn't commit the murder.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Party Politics
programme.desc: Margaret runs into a distant friend who asks her to have an Ann Summers-type party in her home.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Getaway
programme.desc: Margaret is nominated for the Golden Arch Support award for outstanding service in the field of footcare.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: No Trouble
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret decide they need to get fit.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Holiday
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Cottage Country
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret get invited up to the cottage of Dr. Yoselheiffer, President of the Canadian Council of Dentists.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Night In
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret find themselves at loose ends one evening when, to their dismay, they find that there is absolutely nothing to watch on TV.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Trouble with Mummy
programme.desc: Bob is concerned when he hears that his mother's best friend Pearl has passed on.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: When Bobs old friend Clive, (who is a real drunken slob), is dumped by his wife, Bob lets him stay for a few days despite Margaret's objections?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gone to Seed
programme.desc: Bob decides to donate his sperm to a local sperm bank.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: My Foot Hurts
programme.desc: Margaret gets her own local call-in radio show entitled My Foot Hurts. On the first day, nervous and short on callers, she mentions her favourite curry house on the air?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Margaret enters a contest and wins the grand prize: a cycling tour of Holland!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: For Peter's Sake
programme.desc: Bob's brother Peter is a successful chef who has a cooking show producing in India.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Problems
programme.desc: At her clinic one-day, Margaret sees an old school chum, and invites her and her husband Matt to dinner.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Shopping
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret, concerned at the amount they are spending in take away food and expensive local food shops, decide on an expedition to the Super Save Shopatropolis in Croydon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Life Saver
programme.desc: Bob inadvertently saves the life of a suicidal man who then decides to become Bob's best friend.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Dental Convention
programme.desc: The time for the annual dental convention has come. Bob is not keen on going when he sees that a colleague from his student days, Bernard Wiggins, a "loud mouthed big shot", is a featured speaker.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob Gets Wired
programme.desc: When Margaret forgets to pay for some sprinkles at the local cake shop, she is hauled in as a shoplifter.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Book Club
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret join a book club in the hopes of expanding their tiny social horizon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret arrive home from another boring evening out with dreary friends, to find that their dogs behaviour has taken a turn for the worse?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Candidate
programme.desc: Margaret finds herself inadvertently running for City Council when the candidate she is supporting drops out of the race.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gary
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret thought they knew everything about their next door neighbours, until Joyce and Trevor introduce them to their grown son, Gary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: New Lease on Life
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have near-death experience when Bob nearly crashes their car.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween. It is also Bob father's birthday and his mother wants to celebrate by visiting his grave. Bob is not comfortable with this and tries to get out of it.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Friends for Dinner
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have been invited to Neil and Moira's for dinner, or so they think.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Tale of Two Dentists
programme.desc: Bob's business is booming, and when Margaret chips a tooth Bob tells Margaret that he is unable to give her an appointment for sometime.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Mummy's Boy
programme.desc: Bobs mother is coming all the way from England to visit him.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Over-Exposed
programme.desc: Margaret accidentally picks up her neighbour's photos at the pharmacy.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Love's Labours Lost
programme.desc: While listening to the radio, Bob observes his charmless young assistant Penny, inspiring him to recite odes about youth and innocence.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Outward Bound
programme.desc: Bob joins his male colleagues on a canoe trip to a provincial park.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary
programme.desc: While Bob and Margaret are sleeping, the local criminals, Beany and Boney clear their house - TV, video, microwave and electric toothbrush all go.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair
programme.desc: When a patient dies of natural causes while in Bob's surgery, the local papers pick up the story?
programme.sub-title: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Jury Duty
programme.desc: Margaret gets called to Jury Duty but Bob has planned a holiday for them and begs her to get herself excused.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Age Before Beauty
programme.desc: Margaret gets a new hairstyle but Bob doesn't even notice.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Bob or Two
programme.desc: Bob buys an inexpensive painting from the neighbours at a junk sale (mostly motivated by pity since these neighbours have fallen on hard times) and hangs it in his surgery to brighten things up?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: On the Case: The Disappearance of Sarah Stern
programme.desc: A car is discovered abandoned in the middle of a New Jersey bridge, with the keys inside and no driver in sight. Detectives look at three possibilities. Sarah Stern either ran way, jumped off the bridge, or was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: On the Case: Stabbed in the Heart
programme.desc: A beloved mother of four is stabbed to death in her bathroom. A mysterious v shaped wound on her forehead finally leads police to her killer decades later.

programme.title: On the Case: Seven Minutes of Terror
programme.desc: It's two days before Christmas when two men burst into Michael Brinkman's home demanding money. Seven minutes later, the robbers are gone, Brinkman is dead from a gunshot wound to the chest, and some strange but critical evidence has been left behind.

programme.title: On the Case: Deceiving Appearances
programme.desc: Police suspect a mysterious double homicide is not what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: An Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A son discovers his mother's violent murder and police must track down the killer who committed a deadly betrayal.

programme.title: On the Case: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A compassionate and outgoing woman's dream vacation turns into a deadly nightmare when she crosses paths with a wolf in sheep's clothing.

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: A young woman's mysterious murder sends detectives on a heartbreaking search for the truth.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder in Store
programme.desc: In San Antonio, Texas, video game store manager Amber Belken is murdered in an apparent robbery gone wrong. On further investigation, however, detectives are troubled by the evidence.

programme.title: On the Case: Kidnapped on the 4th of July
programme.desc: When a young woman's pizza delivery car is found abandoned in the middle of the desolate stretch of road, a twenty three year mystery begins.

programme.title: On the Case: Blood Money
programme.desc: After 21 years, DNA analysis of a blood-stained dollar bill helps to solve the murder of gas station clerk Bradley Perry.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder at Bird Key
programme.desc: A successful business man is found brutally murdered in his palatial Southern Florida home. A mysterious backpack found at the crime scene is the key to the case.

programme.title: On the Case: Left in the Dark
programme.desc: When a beautiful young graduate student is found stabbed to death, detectives must determine if the murder was a crime of passion or a brutal attack by a violent intruder.

programme.title: On the Case: "Precious" Jane Doe
programme.desc: After a young woman is viciously murdered, police launch a two-part investigation; one to find her killer and a second to identify his victim, "Precious" Jane Doe.

programme.title: On the Case: Vanished in the Night
programme.desc: When 20 year old Lynsie Ekelund suddenly goes missing in the dead of night, it leaves her mother scrambling for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: Hidden by Fire
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a raging house fire they discover the blaze was just the cover up for a vicious murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Web of Torment
programme.desc: The abduction of a young mother from a crowded hospital parking lot is the beginning of a terrifying mystery that will torment her loved ones for decades.

programme.title: On the Case: River of Tears
programme.desc: Paula examines the discovery of a young woman's lifeless body on the bank of a shallow river. A note in her pocket may point to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Complicated Relationship
programme.desc: A beloved mother of four disappears just days after her stepdaughter vanished. Police must investigate to find out if their complicated relationship led to tragedy.

programme.title: On the Case: Unmasking a Killer
programme.desc: A beautiful grad student is found murdered inside a yoga apparel store. On the surface it appeared she was the victim of a botched robbery, but remarkable police work revealed a far more sinister plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Identical Evidence
programme.desc: Police discover a treasure trove of evidence after teacher Genai Coleman is found murdered in a parking lot, but detectives still face a challenge that may prevent the case from being solved.

programme.title: A Century of Science Fiction: Final Frontier
programme.desc: Science fiction has become almost synonymous with outer space - and with good reason. Take a delightful trip among the stars - at warp speed.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Frozen (REDUX)
programme.desc: Dante must decide whether to save a scientist and his son from the clutches of the Raiders, or use them as a bargaining chip to find his own child.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Past Lives (REDUX)
programme.desc: Dante's crew capture an alleged murderer, wanted by The Orchard, who turns out to be Luc's ex-husband. Luc is left with only terrible options.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Family Values (REDUX)
programme.desc: When Dante and Luc capture a Raider, Dante is caught between his sense of justice and his desire for vengeance.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Cell Game (REDUX)
programme.desc: When Dante loses Percy to corrupt Oberon police, he must work out a dangerous deal to free Percy, while she fights for her life in prison.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Blacklight (REDUX)
programme.desc: A cryogenic chamber in an abandoned section of the Tulip is accidentally powered up, and the legendary Colonel Bramwell emerges from a 50-year sleep.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Women Want to Know
programme.desc: Sydney has found a temple with an idol of Ganesha and it is being filmed for TV, but they get trapped inside when the local rebels stumble onto them. Can Nigel and Karen help from USA?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Star of Nadir
programme.desc: An anonymous Sultan's wife Danielle dies in mysterious circumstances in the desert. However, she had called for Sydney to help. Sydney believes Danielle was searching for the Star of Nadir.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Devil Doll
programme.desc: A guide leads Sydney and Nigel to an unusual, underground Aztec burial chamber. Instead of a body, they find a relic.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Incognito
programme.desc: Retrieving a mythical lancet, Sydney and Nigel run into Nigel's look-alike just before his death. Nigel gets a cut from the lancet. Later, Cate persuades Nigel to impersonate the man.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: All Choked Up
programme.desc: Carson Inez, a collector, uses an ancient necklace to get Sydney to help her in raising Athena who will then help her conquer the world.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Warlock of Nu Theta Phi
programme.desc: When Sydney's student Meg's roommate finds a witch's amulet, it hospitalizes Meg. Meg's boyfriend's fraternity brother races to get the amulet. What is he up to?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: While Sydney is lecturing about the Native Americans who faced a mysterious cataclysm 600 years earlier, a native brings her a relic from that era. What is its secret?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Hunting with the Enemy
programme.desc: An urn commissioned in a Cambodian monastery by the Chinese emperor for the remains of Confucius is about to be destroyed by systematic bombing of a whole province.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Under the Ice
programme.desc: Despite terrible weather, Sidney drags Nigel along to an Arctic base where an ancient Indian mummy has been found, who turns out to be an Anasazi.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Antianeirai
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to Istanbul to investigate the death of one Sydney's friends, a professor who was trying to prove Hercules did exist by finding the Belt of Hippolyte.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Faux Fox
programme.desc: When Nigel is charmed by brilliant student Lorraine to show her their offices (and kiss), a burglar knocks out Sidney, but what was robbed?

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E1 - Mind The Baby
programme.desc: Crichton, Aeryn and D'argo are stranded in an asteroid field while Scorpius searches for them. Their safety depends on Crais, who is nearby in Talyn.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E1 - Mind The Baby

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E2 - Vitas Mortis
programme.desc: D'Argo takes part in a sacred ritual that helps an old Luxan, an Orican, to survive.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E3 - Taking The Stone
programme.desc: Chiana leaves Moya and goes to 'grave planet' populated by reckless thrill seekers who play dangerous and life-threatening games.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E3 - Taking The Stone

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Suzy Lamplugh
programme.desc: A look at the case of estate agent Suzy Lamplugh, who showed a client around a house in Fulham in July 1986 and was never seen again. Dermot Murnaghan hosts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rachel Nickell
programme.desc: A hard-hitting look at the murder of Rachel Nickell, who was sexually assaulted and murdered in front of her two-year-old son on Wimbledon Common in 1992.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Moors Murders
programme.desc: An investigation into the Moors Murderers, Myra Hindley and Ian Brady, with interviews with the family of Keith Bennett.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Dale Cregan
programme.desc: It's 2012 and drug dealer Dale Cregan murders police officers Nicola Hughes and Fiona Bone. Dermot Murnaghan investigates.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stepping Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at the series of mysterious deaths that occurred at Stepping Hill Hospital in Stockport, Greater Manchester, in 2011.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Wrongly Released
programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Manchester
programme.desc: The series returns to take a closer look at the most horrific crimes ever committed on British soil, starting with the May 2017 Manchester Arena bombing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: John Sweeney
programme.desc: John Sweeney brutally murdered two of his girlfriends, dismembered their bodies and dumped them in canals. In a macabre twist, he hid clues in his abstract paintings, and five other girlfriends of his are currently still missing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Steven Wright
programme.desc: A closer look at the crimes of Steve Wright, who was dubbed 'The Suffolk Strangler' after murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich in 2006.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Shipman
programme.desc: Doctor Harold Shipman was convicted of killing 15 patients in 2000, but he is thought to have killed up to 215. Discover how he was eventually caught by detectives.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Time Of Death: Albert Walker
programme.desc: When a Devonshire fisherman hauled in his nets on July 28 1996, he made a gruesome discovery: among that day’s catch was a dead body. There was nothing to identify the man’s body except a Rolex watch and a small maple leaf tattoo on his hand.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Appointment With Death: Scott Singleton
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of Scott Singleton, who murdered a 17-year-old girl after luring her to a bogus job interview.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Dead Man's Hollow: Nishan Bakunts
programme.desc: In 2002, an off-duty fireman discovered a body in a field charred beyond all recognition. All the police knew was that the man had died a brutal death, having been stabbed repeatedly, shot in the head, and drenched in petrol before being set alight.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen
programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.
programme.sub-title: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Russell Murders
programme.desc: Bludgeoned to death whilst walking down a country lane, the horrific murders of Lin and Megan Russell made worldwide news. Discover the events of that shocking day.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Angus Sinclair
programme.desc: Angus Sinclair, called Scotland's worst serial killer, is linked to the 1977 murders of two girls in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Gemma McCluskie
programme.desc: The harrowing story of EastEnders actress Gemma McCluskie, who was murdered by her older brother in the flat they shared in east London in 2012.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Ancient Oland Island Massacre
programme.desc: On a Swedish island, archaeologists discover a grisly site. The wreckage of an American Navy plane is located in a surprising place. Finnish farmers unearth something shocking. A baby mammoth found in the permafrost is studied.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Scrab, The Ark And The Rock, The
programme.desc: Was an ancient glass scarab in Tutankhamun’s tomb created by forces that are literally out of this world? Does a 4,000-year-old tablet really have building instructions for Noah’s Ark a thousand years before the Bible is written?
programme.sub-title: Scrab, The Ark And The Rock, The

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of The Arctic Shipwreck
programme.desc: A Russian mystery involving the deaths of nine hikers may finally be solved. A legendary ship is pulled from icy Arctic waters. In Antarctica, a melting glacier could cause a global disaster. Russian researchers find a strange arrangement of bones.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of Glacier Mummy
programme.desc: Mountain climbers in California find the body of a U.S. Army soldier. In Alaska, strange bundles of canvas and wood high up on a mountain are discovered. Volcanic glass is found in an unexpected place. A vital WWII weather station is uncovered.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Siberia's Frozen Necropolis
programme.desc: Researchers find a mummy buried in a strange way. A legendary polar exploration vehicle goes missing in Antarctica. A glacier cave on Mt. St. Helens is explored. An island in the Bering Sea may contain clues to the extinction of the woolly mammoth.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Secrets Of The Ice Arsenal
programme.desc: An unidentified metal object is found on Kiska Island. A centuries-old gold mining mystery is investigated. In Siberia, a network of ice tunnels is explored. Fossils unearthed in the Canadian Arctic lead to the discovery of a new species of camel.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Russia's Mountain Mummy Enigma
programme.desc: Russian soldiers make a grim discovery on a mountain. An abandoned town has an unusual past. Scientists working in Antarctica find something surprising beneath the ice. In Greenland, strange depressions in the ground are investigated.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Buried Secrets Of Mount Cook
programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Freaks Of Nature
programme.desc: Freaks Of Nature: A small community is devastated by an earth-shattering 'boom,' while an paranormal fog seems to alter the very fabric of time.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Paranormal Mysteries
programme.desc: Paranormal Mysteries: A woman is terrorised by an invisible attacker and a mother undergoes a violent and demonic transformation.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Medical Mysteries
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: An adrenaline junkie and her unborn baby somehow survive when their parachute fails, and a firefighter is incinerated in his bed.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Power Of The Mind
programme.desc: Power of the Mind: A housewife has a strange and sudden vision that helps to solve a murder. A man remembers every single moment of his life.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Ancient Mysteries: A girl finds a 1000-year-old skull that may prove aliens once walked the planet, and ancient stone carvings could rewrite the story of evolution.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Amazing Survival
programme.desc: Amazing Survival: Incredible stories of people who cheated death, including a man who escaped from the avalanche of debris caused by the collapse of the World Trade Center.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Man Beasts
programme.desc: Man Beasts: We're all fascinated by mysteries. But is the unexplained really unexplainable? William Shatner investigates in an attempt to find a logical explanation.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Curses
programme.desc: Curses: Do cursed objects really exist? This episode explores a painting in Britain that is said to start deadly house fires, a sinister doll in Florida and a curse-proof house.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: Medics at a hospital fall gravely ill after treating a mysteriously ailing patient in a circumstance that can't be explained by science. Or can it?

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mind Control
programme.desc: Mind Control: Three spine-tingling stories, including a seance that turns a housewife into a literary genius as she channels a spirit to write a series of acclaimed books.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 7
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Moesha: Just Above My Head
programme.desc: Moesha finds her history teacher’s remarks racially offensive, but fears that confronting him might affect her grade and cost Niecy her scholarship.

programme.title: Moesha: A Den Is A Terrible Thing To Waste
programme.desc: A well-intentioned Moesha intervenes to try and stop her once-popular hangout, The Den, from being sold to a commercial developer, unaware that Andell stands to make a great deal of money on its sale.
programme.sub-title: A Den Is A Terrible Thing To Waste

programme.title: Moesha: Isn’t She Lovely?
programme.desc: Hakeem and Moesha’s friendship takes an interesting turn after he surprises her with an expensive necklace to wear to a homecoming dance she’s attending with someone else.

programme.title: Moesha: Unappreciated Interest
programme.desc: Dorian pulls an illegal scam involving Frank’s credit card and makes matters worse by lying about it, behavior that could have dramatic consequences.

programme.title: Moesha: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: With Dee sick in bed with a bad cold, Moesha offers to prepare the Thanksgiving feast but finds herself engaged in a fierce cooking competition with Hakeem’s mother.

programme.title: Moesha: To Sleep – Perchance To Dream
programme.desc: Moesha starts having recurring romantic dreams about Hakeem, giving her second thoughts about their friendship and about sharing a room with him and Niecy on an upcoming ski trip.

programme.title: Moesha: He Doth Protest Too Much
programme.desc: Moesha discovers that some of her college classes are more difficult than she thought; she has a hard time in Chemistry and reluctantly agrees to let Niecy tutor her.

programme.title: Moesha: Let’s Talk About Sex
programme.desc: Moesha crashes in Niecy’s dorm room after a late-night Pendulum party and is horrified to discover that Nicey has also let a male sleep in the room.

programme.title: Moesha: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The arrival of Frank’s Aunt Hattie brings a shocking revelation about Frank that turns the rest of the family – especially Dorian and Moesha – against him.

programme.title: Moesha: Color Him Father
programme.desc: Still reeling from the news that Frank is Dorian’s biological father, the Mitchells prepare for Dorian’s 17th birthday bash, a party that grows more and more elaborate and expensive as Dorian takes full advantage of Frank’s guilt.

programme.title: Moesha: Family Affair
programme.desc: Still angry at Frank for keeping his true relationship to Dorian a secret for so long, Moesha decides not to introduce her father at an upcoming 'Businessman of the Year' awards banquet.

programme.title: Moesha: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Hoping to boost the confidence of her new roommate, Theresa, Moesha asks Hakeem’s good-looking friend to ask Theresa on a date – but can’t leave well enough alone when the date is a success.

programme.title: Moesha: Gimme A Break
programme.desc: Moesha, Niecy, and Hakeem go to Santa Barbara for Spring Break. A campus rival spreads false information that Mo is 'easy' when her ex-boyfriend shows interest in Moesha.

programme.title: Moesha: Something About Moesha
programme.desc: Having been neighbors and friends nearly all their lives, Moesha and Hakeem wonder if there is more to their relationship.

programme.title: Moesha: The Robbing Hood
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem explore their evolving dating relationship. Dorian visits Moesha on campus and Moesha sees this as a chance to forge a sister/brother relationship; items begin missing from dorm rooms and all clues lead towards Dorian.

programme.title: Moesha: Arriving Right On Q
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem’s relationship hits a snag when Q returns to town; sparks fly between Moesha and Q; Q invites Moesha to spend the summer (as a road manager) on tour with his rap group.

programme.title: Moesha: D-Money Loses His Patience
programme.desc: Hakeem tries to convince Moesha to pass on Q’s offer to go on the road with his band, and focus on her priorities: school, family, and him. Moesha admits to being too distracted to make a clear decision.

programme.title: Moesha: On The Rebound
programme.desc: Moesha and Q decide whether or not to take their relationship to the next level; Dorian returns home from boot camp.

programme.title: Moesha: Bad Company
programme.desc: After spending the summer traveling with Q’s band, Moesha returns home sporting an engagement ring.

programme.title: Moesha: Netcam
programme.desc: Someone places a hidden camera in Moesha and Niecy’s dorm room; Myles’ girlfriend tells him she’s pregnant—and he’s the father!

programme.title: Moesha: Living In Paradise
programme.desc: Moesha tries to straighten out her out-of-control roommates, but they’re more interested in chasing Boys II Men.

programme.title: Moesha: You Say He's Just A Friend
programme.desc: Moesha is tempted by her attraction to good-looking Jamal, while Dorian starts up his own hair solon.
programme.sub-title: You Say He's Just A Friend

programme.title: Moesha: Just The Two of Us
programme.desc: While Frank and Dorian are on a road trip to Vegas, Myles falls hard for Moesha’s roommate, Alicia.

programme.title: Moesha: The Nutty Moesha
programme.desc: It’s Halloween and Moesha’s acting crazy, Niecy’s growing body hair, and Dorian’s dogsitting a ferocious bulldog.

programme.title: Moesha: The Candidate
programme.desc: A woman city council candidate loses Moesha’s support when she gets the hots for Hakeem.

programme.title: Moesha: Definitely Not The Cosbys
programme.desc: When Moesha tells her dad she’s engaged, he fantasizes about solving his family problems like Bill Cosby.

programme.title: Moesha: All This & Turkey Too
programme.desc: Q comes home for Thanksgiving and asks Moesha for his ring back.

programme.title: Moesha: The Player
programme.desc: Moesha’s attempt to solve Niecy’s 'ain’t gotta man blues' backfires.

programme.title: Moesha: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem reminisce about their friendship and wonder if it could be developing into something more.

programme.title: Moesha: Run, Mo, Run
programme.desc: An ex-con is after Moesha, and Dorian decides to search for his birth mother.

programme.title: Moesha: Mom
programme.desc: Dorian finds his mom, but it’s Moesha who ends up getting hurt.

programme.title: Moesha: That's My Moma
programme.desc: Dorian thought finding his mom would provide answers, not raise more questions (Lil Bow Wow guest stars).

programme.title: Moesha: What If...
programme.desc: Niecy spins a fantasy about what Moesha’s life would be like if her mom raised her instead of Frank.

programme.title: Moesha: Scary Marriage
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are matched up in a mock marriage for a homework assignment.

programme.title: Moesha: Saving Private Rita
programme.desc: Moesha saves a suicidal friend, while Dorian pretends to be religious to impress a cute girl.

programme.title: Moesha: Mayhem At The Jam
programme.desc: A concert gets out of Moesha’s control and Hakeem takes a beating.

programme.title: Moesha: Creepin’
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem’s relationship heats up, while Dorian dates an older woman.

programme.title: Moesha: Graduation Day
programme.desc: Dorian’s new older girlfriend is enticing him with promises of a record deal, while Mo and Hakeem fight about trust.

programme.title: Kate A Young Queen in Waiting
programme.desc: Kate Middleton, together with her husband Prince William, is leading the British monarchy out of a period of considerable difficulty. She knows that she will one day be Queen. She understands the dignity of that role at the centre of the British nation.

programme.title: Kate Middleton: Working Class to Windsor
programme.desc: Wife, mother, duchess; a journey from working class to Windsor. Kate Middleton’s rise to royalty and influences of international intrigue and admired the world over.

programme.title: Prince William: Destiny
programme.desc: Destiny goes beyond the Royal love affair and explores destiny in relation to the Royal Family.

programme.title: Princes of the Palace
programme.desc: Discover the lives of the British Royal Family's princes and their importance to the Royal House of Windsor. Profiling Princes Phillip, Charles, William, Harry and young Prince George.

programme.title: Princess Diana The Quiet Revolution
programme.desc: No one in history has ever been so universally adored as Diana, Princess of Wales. In her short life she captivated the world with her beauty, charm and limitless compassion.

programme.title: Queen Elizabeth II: Reign Supreme
programme.desc: Reign Supreme is a historical time line, which, chronicles the life of Elizabeth II with a focus on her enduring reign, public image, private life and events since her coronation.

programme.title: Royal Jewels
programme.desc: The Royal Jewels truly represent the mystery and majesty of Monarchy on display, with the Imperial State Crown itself featuring no less than 2,800 diamonds.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: Spare Heirs
programme.desc: The royal children who will never taste the ultimate job - of being a King or Queen of England. From Princess Margaret, who was destined to live and die in her sister's considerable shadow, to Prince Harry, who is making himself universally popular.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: For King and Country
programme.desc: When Edward VIII abdicated, his younger brother, George, suddenly became king and 'inherited' the second world war. The father of Britain's present queen, joined forces with Winston Churchill to stand firm against Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: The Man Who Would be King
programme.desc: Prince William is seen as the 'future' of the British monarchy. The heir to the throne who surveys say most people want to see succeed his grandmother, Queen Elizabeth. Why has William become so popular?
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Would be King

programme.title: Royal Secrets: First Steps
programme.desc: Britain's royal babies used to be born and raised behind closed palace gates. Today, they are part and parcel of the commercialisation of Britain's Royal Family. Not so long ago, access to royal babies was restricted and they didn't even go to school

programme.title: Royal Secrets: An Extraordinary Queen
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth II is the world's oldest monarch and Britain's longest serving Queen. This episode explores the secret of the woman who never expected to become a Queen.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: Edward & Mrs Simpson
programme.desc: The love affair that enthralled the world and brought down a King. The true story of the romance that cost Edward VIII his throne and defined Britain's modern Royal Family.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: Royal Wives
programme.desc: Through the ages they have come to define their Royal husbands behind the scenes. But, in the modern world the royal wives are expected to become part of the family ‘firm'. What is the secret of being a good Royal 'wife'?

programme.title: Royal Secrets: The Royal Mistress
programme.desc: Camilla Parker Bowles was famously referred to as 'the third person' in the marriage of Charles and Diana. Her long standing affair with the heir to the throne made her one of the most famous Royal mistresses in history.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: The People's Princess
programme.desc: Princess Diana became the People's Princess, but her marriage to the heir to the throne, Prince Charles, was a largely loveless affair that saw Diana fighting the royal family she had married into.

programme.title: Royal Secrets: Born to be King
programme.desc: Prince Charles is now the longest 'serving' heir to the British throne in history. He fears that he may never inherit the role he was born to. The Queen's son stands accused of interfering and meddling in British life and the politics of a nation.

programme.title: Royals And Their Pets
programme.desc: The Royal family has always had a very special relationship with their pets: from the lapdog who hid under Mary, Queen of Scots' skirts at her execution to Caesar, King Edward VII's terrier who took precedence over 9 Kings at his masters' State Funeral.

programme.title: Spying on the Royals: Part 1
programme.desc: The royal romance between Edward VIII and Wallis Simpson can now be seen through a unique new perspective: the eyes of those who spied on them, creating a secret dossier unlike any other.

programme.title: Spying on the Royals: Part 2
programme.desc: Newly declassified secret files reveal how King George VI and even the President of the United States ordered espionage on the former Edward VIII and Wallis Simpson, based on intelligence that Edward was attempting to usurp George VI.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part I: The Young Princess
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980 a shy young girl arrives at Balmoral Castle, two years later that girl becomes a royal Princess. At just 20 years old Lady Diana Spencer married HRH Prince Charles to become HRH Princess Of Wales.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part II: Broken Hearts
programme.desc: The marriage of Prince Charles and Princess Diana remains infamous for being one of the most turbulent royal weddings in modern history. As the cracks began to form the world watched.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part III: Legacy of Love
programme.desc: A late-night phone call from Paris brought news that would rock the world. The sudden and tragic death of Princess Diana devastated millions. Hear what it was really like to be at the eye of the storm.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Chelmsford
programme.desc: Location, Location, Location is off to Chelmsford this week to solve the property problems of two couples at opposite ends of the budget scale.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Riverside
programme.desc: London is one of the most expensive and competitive cities to buy property in the world so they're going to have to pull out all the stops if they're going to make these property dreams a reality.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Welsh Borders
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are dealing with a full-blown mid-life crisis in the Welsh Borders! Management trainer Mel has set them the challenge of finding a hillside home to house his very own leadership and team building centre

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: St Albans
programme.desc: Searching in prime commuter territory where property isn't cheap. Both couples have high expectations for their first homes and our duo will need all of their property know-how to come out on top!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week we've been called in to help a lucky couple that have just scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and want to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Aberdeen City
programme.desc: Newlyweds Emma and Mike are bursting to move on and up.

programme.desc: We have a teenager with an epic budget keen for independence; and a young couple with high hopes that their funds will stretch to the dream flat. Kirstie and Phil are on their home turf –can they secure a famous victory?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Surrey

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Hastings

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Warwickshire & Chelmsford
programme.desc: This week we're catching up with two couples whose extensive requirements almost drove us to distraction.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Tufnell Park
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil almost come to blows when they take on the impossible – finding a flat with private parking in pricey North London for £290,000. They're helping Laura Cream, a very single-minded young lady.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bucks & Aberdeen Revisit
programme.desc: In Buckinghamshire, Emma and Andrew had been looking for the ideal family home, whilst in Aberdeenshire Karen and Russell needed to cut down their daily commute.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Windsor Revisit
programme.desc: About two years ago, first time buyers asked us to guide them. I've come back to see whether or not they lived happily.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Windsor
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Windsor -with two sets of well-traveled first time buyers

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Northside
programme.desc: Kirstie's house hunter is London born and bred and has viewed a whopping 90 properties already-whilst Phil's couple have yet to view a single place and have no idea where to buy.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit 2: Jersey/Warwickshire
programme.desc: This week we're going back to visit two very different sets of house hunters who had one thing on their minds – space, and they wanted lots of it!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire & Guildford
programme.desc: After winning one point eight million on the lottery, they needed a new house.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bath
programme.desc: This week we're back catching up with Sadie Yukon and Simon Gwillian, a picky pair who really put us through the mill.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Cheltenham And Gloucestershire

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Glasgow

programme.desc: It's the battle of the Scottish chefs – Alan Murchison, Colin Buchan, and Mark Greenaway. Today is the final chance to impress the veteran with their dessert dishes.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from Scotland. One chef left the competition and only two remain, who will cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Starter
programme.desc: It's the battle of the Central chefs – returning contenders, Aktar Islam and Daniel Clifford and newcomer Paul Foster. They kick things off with their starters, but which one is going to be first off the blocks?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Fish
programme.desc: It's the battle of the Central chefs – returning contenders, Aktar Islam and Daniel Clifford and newcomer Paul Foster. Today they cook their fish course, but which one will prevail?

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julia Roberts
programme.desc: Movie star Julia Roberts joins Bear on a lifesaving Red Nose Day adventure in Kenya. They're on a two-day trek enduring blistering savannah temperatures.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Michael B. Jordan
programme.desc: Actor Michael B. Jordan joins Grylls in Wales where they start their journey by dropping into rough waters off the coast before making their way up the coast and to the top of the mountains for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Roger Federer
programme.desc: Bear takes one of the best athletes of all time, Roger Federer, on a daring adventure through the Swiss Alps as they attempt to navigate the tough terrain. They descend a frozen waterfall and use tennis rackets as snowshoes.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Sterling K. Brown
programme.desc: Actor Sterling K. Brown joins Bear in the high mountains of Colorado, where they battle plummeting temperatures while descending a sheer rock face, track an elusive deer and rappel down a waterfall.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Zac Efron
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Zac Efron heads into the Appalachian wilderness of the Catskill Mountains in New York. They parachute into the woods, rappel down cliffs and search for shelter.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Mel B
programme.desc: Spice Girl Mel B joins Bear on the two hundred foot cliffs of the Welsh coastline, where a final descent sends Mel into breakdown mode; Bear is stung by a jellyfish, forcing Mel to practice some first aid skills.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Nick Jonas
programme.desc: Renowned survivalist Bear Grylls is accompanied by singer Nick Jonas on another one of his journeys into the wilderness.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Scott Eastwood
programme.desc: Actor Scott Eastwood joins Bear on a journey through the harsh Bulgarian outback; the duo rappel from a towering arch, cross a raging river, descend into a dark cave and face off against a snake; Scott details growing up with his famous father.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Shaquille O'Neal
programme.desc: Bear and NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal are lifted from a freight train via helicopter and whisked away to a dense forest in the remote Adirondacks; they face blood-sucking leeches, and a 200-foot rock face as they search for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Hudson
programme.desc: Oscar-nominated actress Kate Hudson goes on a journey with Bear that involves a treacherous mountain range in Italy; Kate shares details of her unique upbringing.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a trek through the mountains of New England, which includes crossing a raging river and a climb to a towering railroad bridge. Bear considers a porcupine carcass for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Marshawn Lynch
programme.desc: Bear and Super Bowl champion Marshawn Lynch tackle a rugged mountain range that has sharp cliffs and dark chasms; the pair comes face to face with the French Foreign Legion and pursues a wild hog for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julianne Hough
programme.desc: Bear and actress Julianne Hough navigate the unforgiving terrain and wild animals of the African savanna; Julianne talks about her adolescence and her determination to succeed.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Deon Sanders
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes NFL hall of famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first ever camping trip.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Keri Russell
programme.desc: Keri Russell and Bear journey through the Canary Islands; they dine on undigested seeds from a pigeon carcass, use a grappling hook and make a daring escape from a mountain peak using a paraglider; Keri discusses her family and path to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Joseph Gordon-Levitt
programme.desc: Bear and Joseph Gordon-Levitt navigate Kenya's unyielding terrain; Joseph and Bear navigate a perilous rappel, milk a camel for hydration, ascend a massive rock dome and battle a crocodile for dinner; Joseph talks about his family and rise to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Actress Courteney Cox joins Bear to challenge herself into sharp edged discomfort amidst the jagged peaks and descending cliffs on the windswept coast of Ireland.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ben Stiller
programme.desc: Ben Stiller travels to Northern Scotland to face the Isle of Skye's rugged mountains. Stiller discusses his background while they navigate slippery terrain, searching for food and clean water.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ed Helms
programme.desc: Actor Ed Helms faces sheer cliffs, crumbling rock and a cringeworthy dinner menu while atop Colorado mountains; Helms discusses the road to his career in comedy.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Michelle Rodriguez
programme.desc: Actress Michelle Rodriguez and Bear go to a desert Nevada; unexpected high winds during a sky-diving trip send Michelle off course; Michelle and Bear must come up with clever ways to stay hydrated.
