programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Storm Warning
programme.desc: A storm is racing towards the north Atlantic fishing grounds, but with time ticking away on the bluefin tuna season, the captains have no choice but to head out to fish in the rough weather.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Hell On The High Seas
programme.desc: It is week eight of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, and cracks are starting to show in the Gloucester fleet, with captains and crews pushing each other to the limit.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Meltdown
programme.desc: Tensions reach their breaking point amongst the Gloucester fleet as captains, mates and vessels fall apart.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Carnage
programme.desc: It's a battle of wills on the North Atlantic, as two of Gloucester's top Bluefin fishermen - friends-turned-foes Paul Hebert and Dave Carraro - go head-to-head to out-fish each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Twice Bitten
programme.desc: With only two weeks left on the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, just one fish is not enough for the Gloucester captains – and the lure of doubling their luck is overpowering.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Money On The Line
programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Back In The Hunt
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, head for open seas in hopes of catching the first fish of the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Fish!
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for the elusive and lucrative giant Bluefin tuna, with harpooners going up against rod-and-reelers.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Numbers War
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester battle for prime fishing spots in their quest to catch the elusive and lucrative Bluefin Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Fish Fight
programme.desc: For the tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, it's tournament time, and, with a big cash prize up for grabs, the fight is on to catch the biggest bluefin.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Shark Attack
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, are facing a dangerous new foe, with great white sharks swarming into local waters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sweet Smell of Revenge
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle droves of bumbling amateur fishermen in their bid to catch lucrative Atlantic Bluefin Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Storm Warning
programme.desc: A storm is racing towards the north Atlantic fishing grounds, but with time ticking away on the bluefin tuna season, the captains have no choice but to head out to fish in the rough weather.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Hell On The High Seas
programme.desc: It is week eight of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, and cracks are starting to show in the Gloucester fleet, with captains and crews pushing each other to the limit.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Meltdown
programme.desc: Tensions reach their breaking point amongst the Gloucester fleet as captains, mates and vessels fall apart.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Crossing The Line
programme.desc: A teacher excuses himself for a nap after dinner, but he never wakes up. The man has a complex medical history that leads Dr. G on a hunt for an explanation for his mysterious death.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Nick Gage – The Lying Lothario
programme.desc: Fantasist Gage preyed on lonely women he would meet on dating sites.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: John Myatt and John Drew – The Art World Con
programme.desc: The pair pulled off the biggest art con of the 20th Century, passing off works painted by Myatt as genuine works by famous artists.
programme.sub-title: John Myatt and John Drew – The Art World Con

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Juan Carlos Guzman-Betancourt – Globe-trotting Trickster
programme.desc: In 1993, a young boy made the headlines when he was found as a stowaway on a plane which had arrived in Miami.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Vanished
programme.desc: A small town public school teacher fails to arrive for work for the first time in thirty years, leaving an empty house and a baffled community.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Secret Life
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, a beautiful Ethiopian woman is found brutally strangled. The victim’s husband seems genuinely distraught over his wife’s death, but there is something strangely suspicious about him.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Double Cross
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of a shady Montreal businessman takes detectives into the lurid underworld of drug dealers, con men, and crooked lawyers.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Dead End
programme.desc: A young couple hits the road, hitchhiking across North America. Free spirits keen to explore the world. When the young woman stops phoning home, her father is alarmed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Betrayed
programme.desc: 19 year old Greg Parsons is convicted of brutally murdering his mother mainly on evidence of the audio tape of a song he'd written, "Kill your Parents".

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Mad Bomber
programme.desc: In 1996 a serial bomber begins planting bombs in public places and terrorizes the Prince Edward Island community. The mystery person leaves a strange swastika as a calling card, eluding capture for eight years.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A wealthy Asian girl is kidnapped in Vancouver. When the kidnappers make the fateful error of using the young girl’s cell phone, police are able to track their movements and capture the assailants.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Head in a Bucket
programme.desc: A woman is told by a friend that she was a passenger in a car where she was confronted with a guy's head in a bucket.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: In a Toronto suburb during the summer of 1996, a man leaves home for a business trip. He doesn’t return. Fearing foul play, his desperate wife finally reports her husband’s disappearance to the police.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Stranger
programme.desc: Bored at home, a retiree takes a job at a 24-hour convenience store. On her third night at work a customer finds her behind the register in a pool of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: Two murders of mothers in their own homes send shock-waves through a normally quiet and friendly town where everybody leaves their doors unlocked. The crimes go unsolved until twenty-eight years later.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Game
programme.desc: 1995 - Houston, Texas. A lonely man calls a dating service and gets more than he bargained for when he is met at gunpoint and robbed by his “dates”. The women, dubbed “Thelma & Louise”, lure men with the promise of sex but then drug and rob them.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Killer Cop (Tavernier Case)
programme.desc: Firefighters in Barbizieux, Charente, are called to a fire in a large house in the village. They arrive to find the lifeless body of the owner, Claude Tavernier, 83, lying in a large pool of blood.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)
programme.desc: Police in Strasbourg receive a startling emergency call from Doctor Jean-Louis Muller, a forensic pathologist well known in the region.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)
programme.desc: Laetitia Perrais, 18, a trainee hotel waitress, vanishes after evening service.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaff Case)
programme.desc: A damaged bike belonging to Karine Schaaff, 16, is found abandoned by the side of a road in Moselle.
programme.sub-title: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaff Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)
programme.desc: On the night of July 16, 2000, the life of Edwige Alessandri changed forever. She made a frantic emergency call in the town of Carpentras. She recounted that some men burst into her room and shot her husband while he slept.
programme.sub-title: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Dire Deception (Laurence Maille Case)
programme.desc: On November 28, 2007, Laurence Maille disappeared. It was her partner, John Zablevski, who alerted the Vimy police in Pas-de-Calais. He explained that the young woman had left in the morning for a walk with their dog and never returned.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)
programme.desc: On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had found her unconscious in the bathroom with a mysterious plastic bag next to her
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Blacktown Boys
programme.desc: The body of a local beauty queen is found in a farmer‚Äôs field near Sydney, Australia, and the entire country is riveted.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Butcher of St. Ustache
programme.desc: Near Montreal, a husband comes home from work and finds his wife bound, gagged and shot in the head.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Peter John Peters: The Tattoo Man
programme.desc: A weeklong crime spree began with the murder of a young woman, found naked, stabbed and strangled in the closet of an abandoned apartment in London, Ontario.
programme.sub-title: Peter John Peters: The Tattoo Man

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Boardinghouse Killer
programme.desc: Dorothea Puente provided shelter for the infirm in her boardinghouse. It wasn't until a body was found in her yard that authorities realized she was not who she appeared to be.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: In 1985, a brutal killer had Southern Californians fearing for their lives.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Russians Are Killing
programme.desc: It is just another meeting for Los Angeles real estate developer Meyer Muscatel. Unfortunately Muscatel meets with a Russian immigrant with murderous intent.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Candy Man
programme.desc: On August 8, 1973, police in Pasadena, Texas received a phone call from a young man who had just committed murder.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The BTK Strangler
programme.desc: In 1974, a man identifying himself as the BTK (Bind, Torture, Kill) Strangler started a killing spree in Kansas spanning the next two decades.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: A common-law couple was found guilty of the 1990 rape and murder of Taunja Bennett near Portland, Oregon.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Murderous Mastermind
programme.desc: In downtown Edmonton, a prominent business owner is found shot to death in his business.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Lady-Killer
programme.desc: A hunter on the outskirts of Saskatoon, Saskatchewan stumbles across human remains.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Killing Cousins
programme.desc: On July 26, 1983, police in Vero Beach, Florida received a report of a nude man firing shots at a naked girl on a residential street.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Wilderness Murders
programme.desc: Ricky Dale Hemphill and companion Charla Toma set out for a picnic along a river near Brookings, Oregon in the fall of 1979. A day later Ricky is found murdered and Charla is missing.

programme.title: Crime Stories: David Snow: The House Hermit
programme.desc: A young Vancouver woman is tied to a tree and sexually assaulted for 9 straight days just yards away from the busiest highway in Canada.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Railcar Killer
programme.desc: One of the most intensive manhunts in the history of Texas took place over the summer of 1999 when a brutal serial killer was on the loose.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Laser Man
programme.desc: During a time when immigration to Sweden was growing, feelings of racism were also on the rise. On August 2, 1991, one man began to act by shooting young immigrants on the streets of Stockholm.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Woodchipper Wife-Killer
programme.desc: In November 1986, a snowstorm rips through Connecticut, leaving wife and mother Helle Crafts missing.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homicidal Handyman
programme.desc: In Sacramento in the mid 1980s, a ruthless killer was making his way through the fringe community of Oak Park.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 4
programme.desc: A Glenbrook farmer has been left seriously injured after one of his Highland cows has taken to him with its horns.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5
programme.desc: A truck driver who had one leg amputated 40 years ago, has crashed his truck and crushed his remaining leg. If Rescue 1 can't get him to hospital in time, he will bleed to death.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11
programme.desc: The team is responding to a life-threatening emergency. A cyclist in his 60s, Terrence Williams, is unresponsive and critical after an accident 15 minutes flying time from Auckland, near the small settlement of Maramarua.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5
programme.desc: The team are being sent out to a traumatic accident that will end up being rather close to home.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 36
programme.desc: The doctors treat patients with sports-related injuries.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 37

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 38
programme.desc: The doctors treat patients with heart concerns.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 39

programme.desc: With the computer system down, the staff resort to a whiteboard to keep track of everyone.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 1
programme.desc: The team treats patients suffering from heart attacks and road traffic collisions.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 1
programme.desc: Doctor Sue checks over a man found unconscious at home.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 8
programme.desc: Barnsley Casualty is facing one of its toughest shifts to date with beds becoming limited.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 9
programme.desc: The emergency bikers race to help a Birmingham toddler who’s in agony after a nasty fall and a woman struggling to breathe in Oxford. In Essex, biker cop Lucy Watson finds herself on the end of a charm assault and in North Yorkshire.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: A suspected heart attack and a desperate search to try and find two riders who could be seriously injured are two cases facing Bristol biker paramedic Dean Wingnut Wiltshire.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 9
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire the biker cops of the county’s road traffic squad spring into action. PC Lee Cobb races to respond to an emergency call and find that a motionless motorcyclist has been catapulted over a roundabout.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: A&E deal with a man who fell off a roof and the victim of an overturned car.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 9
programme.desc: A woman has a life-threatening allergic reaction to nuts. A man has an arm injury.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: Physiotherapist helps 90-year-old Audrey who bashed her head in the hospital restaurant.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 6

programme.title: Scorpion: Pilot
programme.desc: When a crisis at LAX leaves dozens of airplanes unable to land, the government enlists a team of misfit geniuses to save the day.

programme.title: Scorpion: Single Point of Failure
programme.desc: The Governor calls on Team Scorpion when his daughter is mysteriously "bio-hacked" with a deadly virus and has only 24 hours to live.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Cyclone
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is determined to prove their worth when a bomber threatens to take out the internet infrastructure of the entire Southwest.

programme.title: Scorpion: Shorthanded
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Las Vegas for a simple casino job, but a robbery leads to Walter's arrest and the rest of the team is left to clear his name.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plutonium Is Forever
programme.desc: To fix a Los Angeles nuclear reactor that's on the verge of a cataclysmic meltdown, Walter and the team must reluctantly enlist the help of a troubled former member.

programme.title: Scorpion: True Colors
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must pass a mandated psych evaluation or face being disbanded after they're accused of destroying a priceless work of art in an attempt to protect an art exhibit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Father's Day
programme.desc: A case gets personal for Team Scorpion when three convicts break out of prison and one of them is a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the others steal billions online.

programme.title: Scorpion: Risky Business
programme.desc: Team Scorpion enlists the help of a musician who created a controversial algorithm that generates hit songs to help find the murderer of a music blogger.

programme.title: Scorpion: Rogue Element
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help protect Cabe's ex-wife after she uncovers evidence that suggests foul play in the death of a prominent congressman.

programme.title: Scorpion: Talismans
programme.desc: When a military plane is shot down in Bosnia, Team Scorpion must help recover its stealth technology before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Scorpion: Revenge
programme.desc: When Sylvester accidentally triggers an explosive device during an investigation, Team Scorpion must focus on finding who's responsible even while their friend's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dominoes
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Team Scorpion races to find a way to save a young boy's life after he gets trapped in a beachside cave and drowning is imminent.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kill Screen
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help Ralph when the FBI questions him after his dark web game play inadvertently reveals the location of a CIA safe house and results in the murder of CIA operatives.

programme.title: Scorpion: Charades
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is tasked with uncovering a mole inside the CIA whose judgment is clouded by matters of the heart and is being coerced into stealing deadly chemicals.

programme.title: Scorpion: Forget Me Nots
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must jog the memory of an injured former Secret Service agent who is their only hope of preventing weapons of mass destruction being launched from a secret U.S. nuclear silo.

programme.title: Scorpion: Love Boat
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on a cruise ship to locate and disable deadly stolen rockets.

programme.title: Scorpion: Going South
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Mexico when a tech billionaire hires them to rescue his kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Scorpion: Once Bitten, Twice Die
programme.desc: When a conflict in Eastern Europe threatens to escalate, Team Scorpion is called on to help facilitate secret peace talks to prevent World War III.

programme.title: Scorpion: Young Hearts Spark Fire
programme.desc: While on a mission to save lost hikers, Team Scorpion's helicopter crashes, igniting a massive wildfire that quickly closes in on them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crossroads
programme.desc: To protect a key witness who is en route to testifying against a deadly drug cartel, Team Scorpion takes her on the run, with the cartel hot on their heels.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Walter finally learns Cabe's long-kept secret regarding the Baghdad mission, and it threatens to tear Team Scorpion apart forever.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Alliance
programme.desc: With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage the planet-sized, transformed Unicron in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Union
programme.desc: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without. Red Alert and the kids use the portal to travel to Unicron's core.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Origin
programme.desc: With the minicons protecting Cybertron and Hot Shot's team attacking Unicron from outside, and Optimus and Galvatron facing Sideways at Unicron's heart, the purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mortal Combat
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus, and the fight wakes Unicron again. Galvatron makes the ultimate sacrifice to finally end the threat. Jetfire and Hot Shot return the children to earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Fallen
programme.desc: When Cybertron is threatened by a colossal black hole, Optimus Prime and the Autobots give the order to evacuate the planet. However, a mysterious stranger holds one last hope…

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Haven
programme.desc: With the help of their human friends, the Autobots construct a new HQ on Earth, but will Megatron discover their secret base before it's finished?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hidden
programme.desc: The Autobots attempt to blend in by assuming alternate transformation modes suitable for Earth. Meanwhile, the Decepticons engage human military forces, and the Autobots are forced to intervene.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Landmine
programme.desc: Landmine tries to adjust to life on Earth while recovering from the injury Starscream's null cannons inflicted on him.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Space
programme.desc: Bud is taken into space so he can see what the Earth is really like, but trouble occurs when he and Scattershot must be saved while the others are fighting against Thundercracker and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Rush
programme.desc: Hotshot and Megatron race against Override in an attempt to win the first cyber planet key. Will either win when Crumplezone and Ransack are interfering?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Speed
programme.desc: Starscream plots how he can defend his title as Megatron's right-hand man while Thundercracker lures the Autobots into a trap. Meanwhile, Hot Shot tries another attempt to beat Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Collapse
programme.desc: Megatron searches for the Cyber Planet Key with extreme force, while the Autobots try to stop the massive earthquakes that are threatening the city.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Time
programme.desc: Red Alert becomes concerned at the desperate measures Hot Shot is taking to beat Override, while Vector Prime and the kids travel to the Sahara in search of the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Search
programme.desc: The Autobots join Vector Prime to search for the Omega Lock, while Overhaul is left stranded by a surprise attack by Megatron and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Deep
programme.desc: Overhaul and Megatron try to convince inhabitants of the Jungle Planet of their 'good' intentions, while the Autobots investigate the appearance of a new Atlantean symbol.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ship
programme.desc: After the "Atlantis" ship disappeared, Optimus Prime and Megatron head to the moon where it's hiding while Vector Prime and the kids locate the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hero
programme.desc: Optimus discovers that Hot Shot has disobeyed his orders while Red Alert has covered for him. However, he is forced to put his trust into Hot Shot to win the Cyber Key from Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Race
programme.desc: Hot Shot and the Autobots battle Ransack and Crumplezone in the first round, while Starscream continues to build his forces when he recruits Mudflap and Lori and Bud uncover information on the Ancients' prehistoric visit to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Detour
programme.desc: As the race for the Speed Planet Cup continues, Hot Shot teaches Override the Autobots' code of honor, while Overhaul faces Scourge on the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Savage
programme.desc: Koby helps Hot Shot to train for the grueling next leg of the Speed Planet Cup, while Optimus Prime and Vector Prime answer a distress call from the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Sand
programme.desc: Hot Shot takes a dangerous gamble in the next round of the Speed Planet Cup, while Sideways tries to pit the Autobots against the Decepticons against each other...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Champion
programme.desc: After the terrible injuries sustained in the last race, Hot Shot cannot finish the final race on his own... Leaving Coby to enter the tournament as Hot Shot's driver.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ice
programme.desc: Bud, Lori and Coby encounter government scientist Professor Suzuki while investigating strange phenomena at the North Pole, while Starscream plans a new attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Honor
programme.desc: Leobreaker disobeys Optimus' direct orders and attacks Scourge. Although Scourge now respects Leobreaker, the incident has caused a rift between him and Optimus...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Primal
programme.desc: Scourge and Optimus Prime battle each other for the Jungle Planet Cyber Key with Override from Speed Planet and Lori from earth being the guest viewers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trust
programme.desc: In an attempt to confuse the Decepticons, Optimus makes duplicate cyber keys for each Autobot. Meanwhile Dr. Suzuki makes an amazing discovery at the North Pole.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trap
programme.desc: The secret history of Earth and Cybertron is revealed with the awakening of monster-hunting Autobot Smokescreen/Crosswise. Meanwhile the Autobots are drawn into a cavern filled with ancient Decepticons...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Invasion
programme.desc: Starscream unleashes the ancient Decepticons in an attempt to find Earth's Cyber Planet Key, Optimus leads the Autobots in battle...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Retreat
programme.desc: The Minicons rescue the kids from the military, while Sideways learns the location of the Autobots' Earth base and leads every Decepticon to Coby's home town...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Revelation
programme.desc: Scourge frees Megatron from Starscream's trap and heads toward Earth. The Autobots must deal with Megatron and locating Starscream's location at the same time.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Critical
programme.desc: Just as all hope is lost, the light of Primus shines down on the fallen Autobot warriors (Scattershot, Red Alert, and Hot Shot) and resurrects them.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Assault
programme.desc: A three-way battle unfolds between the Decepticons, the Autobots, and Starscream's forces. Then, an Autobot warrior named Wing Saber appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Starscream
programme.desc: With the Autobots closing in, Starscream unleashes the Omega Lock's power and grows to a tremendous size.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: United
programme.desc: Override, Evac, and Leobreaker are sent to help the Cybertron Defense team on Cybertron. Megatron's Decepticons follow as well as Thunderblast who joins Megatron. Optimus and Wing Saber combine and overpower Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Cybertron
programme.desc: The Autobots are finally able to destroy Megatron. They then try to revive Cybertron using the Omega Lock, but it triggers a reaction that seemingly begins to tear apart the planet!

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Balance
programme.desc: The true form of planet Cybertron is revealed as the planet sized transformer, Primus. Jolt is used as the device to connect and relay the messages of Primus, who begins to speak of things that have long since passed.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Darkness
programme.desc: The Autobots search for Jolt and the kids who have been kidnapped by Sideways and Starscream, but Megatron has discovered new information regarding Unicron's dark power that could alter the effects of the war.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Memory
programme.desc: The kids are forced to use trickery to keep Sideways and Starscream from deleting Jolt's memory, but the Autobots are getting closer with every minute.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Escape
programme.desc: Jolt and the kids manage to get off a distress call, but Megatron refuses to let Optimus out of battle forcing Vector Prime to lead the rescue team with one big question: will they arrive on time?

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Wabakimi
programme.desc: Les and Logan set out for a fishing trip in a tin boat. Stranded after their motor dies, Les and Logan are quickly plunged into an intense survival situation that could happen to any summer cottager.

programme.title: Survivorman: Colorado Rockies
programme.desc: Out for a casual day's ride, Les (and horses) have to survive temperatures that vary from 70°F in the day to snow flurries at night.

programme.title: Survivorman: Where the Myth Began
programme.desc: Les tracks Bigfoot in the ancient red cedar forests of northwest California. This Sasquatch hotspot is renowned for reports of Bigfoot, and the forest is crawling with black bears. Will Les brave its dangers and catch Sasquatch on camera?

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Arctic
programme.desc: Les has been equipped with a bare minimum of raw materials to aid him for the next 7 days; a hunk of uncooked seal liver, some oil-rich blubber for heat, a seal hook, three matches, and a knife.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arctic Tundra
programme.desc: In the land of the midnight sun, Survivorman heads in to 72°.46 N – the northern tip of Baffin Island. On-route the boats are surrounded by a pod of orca.

programme.title: Survivorman: Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Through the perilous jungle Survivorman treks deep, with the help of a couple of local guides. Led off the beaten path he is deserted alone in this primordial landscape.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Jungle
programme.desc: Les pits his jungle survival skills against the incredibly diverse mountain jungle terrain of Grenada's largest active mountain, Mt. St. Catherine.

programme.title: Survivorman: Patagonia
programme.desc: Les Stroud travels to Patagonia – one of the most beautiful places on the planet – to teach the right way to take on adventure travel.

programme.title: Survivorman: Northern Ontario
programme.desc: Temagami is home of some of the oldest rocks on the face of the planet, old growth pine forests, clear deep lakes, and boasts artifacts and stone drawings dating as far back as 6000 B.C.

programme.title: Survivorman: Hidden World of Bigfoot
programme.desc: Les jumps from forest to forest across North America in search of Sasquatch, returning to a legendary Bigfoot hotspot in the Canadian wild. Here, he'll use a brand-new approach to discover whether there's any way to explain mysterious noises in the night.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arizona Desert
programme.desc: Riding a dirt bike out into the official middle of nowhere, Les simulates a break-down scenario. Half a gallon of water, a snack bar and his multi-tool are all he has with him for the next 7 days.

programme.title: Survivorman: Fan Challenge
programme.desc: For the very first time, Les Stroud takes a fan into the wilderness to survive alongside him, showing him the ropes of what it takes to be Survivorman.

programme.title: Survivorman: Fighting To Survive
programme.desc: Les Stroud, TV's Survivorman, will teach Elias the ways of survival. However, he won't teach him everything he needs to know.

programme.title: Survivorman: Portland Oregon
programme.desc: Les goes to a secret location just outside of Portland, Oregon with his friend and filmmaker Devon Massyn in search of Bigfoot.

programme.title: Survivorman: Australian Outback
programme.desc: Forced to land his ultralight aircraft due to a miscalculation in fuel, Survivorman is once again out to endure the elements for seven days in this spectacular locale… the Australia Outback.

programme.title: Survivorman: Searching the Southwest
programme.desc: Les follows a trail from Texas to Utah in his quest to catch Bigfoot on camera. Locals report encounters in haunted mountains and spooky canyons, and Les applies scientific methods and his survival skills to lure the legend out of hiding.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tierra del Fuego
programme.desc: Les will be dropped into this inhospitable landscape of Tierra del Fuego, Argentina, the easternmost tip of Isla Grande and left to survive with no food, no shelter, no water, and no safety gear or camera crew.

programme.title: Survivorman: 24hrs
programme.desc: Les and Bill Engvall survive for 24 hours in the deserts of Nevada.

programme.title: Survivorman: Utah Canyonlands
programme.desc: Stroud will cannibalize the mountain-bike he has ridden into the middle of nowhere. He also has a multi-tool, a magnesium flint stick and an old energy bar that he uses for a purpose other than eating

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman heads home after church, but never makes it there alive, triggering a homicide investigation.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Volunteers and police spend weeks searching for a missing girl. A psychic later leads them to a field where the body was found.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a security camera reveals a woman has been abducted and murdered, investigators link it to a similar case five months earlier. Could there be a serial killer on the loose?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Canada's only forensic optometrist uses a squashed tomato and a mere pinpoint reflection of light to uncover the identity of a killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Ten years after the murder of a rock singer, forensic scientists use evidence collected by an investigator to finally bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A professor of geological sciences helps police get the 'dirt' on the killer of a missing university student, hoping he can lead them to her murderer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A pair of tennis shoes are found near a victim who had been stabbed on the beach, less than ten yards from her hotel.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Two years after a girl went missing from her home, a new finger print examiner arrives in Colorado. He reveals a little-known fact, entirely changing the police investigation.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Groundbreaking tests reveal the race, eye colour and hair colour of the person responsible for killing two young women on Halloween night.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: With no money, no lawyer and only a fifth grade education, a convicted murderer has a slim chance of overturning his guilty verdict, but that won't stop him trying.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After a young girl recants the testimony that convicted her uncle for murder, his wife battles to find the real killer, hoping his denial of a retrial will be overturned.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1984 police failed to convict the murderer of a college student. Can new technology finally help the police to catch her killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young woman is found murdered, two weeks after reporting a road rage incident. Evidence is leading not to the aggressive driver, but one of their own.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The unexpected and strange death of a health-conscious woman prompts an investigation, which leads to the discovery a mysterious letter.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1984, a young woman is found murdered on the side of a rural Wisconsin driveway after a night of partying. Detectives initially have plenty of suspects, but the case remains unsolved.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Bill Sparkman is found hanging naked from a tree with the letters 'FED' scrawled on his chest. With barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A murder victim's final moments are caught on tape. The crime scene looks like a clear robbery-murder. Text evidence at first points to a jilted lover who has an alibi which needs checking.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A 20-year-old woman sets out on her bike and never returns. Her body is found a few miles from her house, with a gunshot wound to the head. Eventually modern technology breaks the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The mysterious murder of a young teacher's aide leaves a big hole in her small community. Generations of investigators and a scientific breakthrough leads to a shocking end to a tragic case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A building manager finds the lifeless body of a young woman in her first apartment. The case goes cold, then a new forensic tool examines the old evidence. Will science crack the case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A single mum looking for love vanishes without a trace. Foul play is confirmed when a large pickup truck toolbox opens to her body stuffed inside. Can forensic evidence connect the dots?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Navy lieutenant Lee Hartley is murdered while deployed out to sea. Investigators discover Lee had enemies aboard the ship, but it takes years before they discover what really happened.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mortally wounded woman crawls to call 911. Her husband gets a hard look from police, but claims to have an airtight alibi. The intricate forensic science of ballistics is brought to bear.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Deeply religious Gail Fulton is shot execution style in the quiet suburbs of Michigan. Surveillance reveals it was a trio of killers. Eventually, detectives get a break: a handwritten note.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1990, three sex workers are murdered. A serial killer was on the loose and detectives had few clues. Over 20 years later there's a break in the case - and an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A morning house fire kills the only doctor in the small town of Laeger, West Virginia. An investigation quickly leads to the arrest of Jason Lively, the son of the doctor's long-time nurse.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a hearing impaired 77-year-old on a road trip is attacked by a thief and shot to death, investigators are determined to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A criminally charged sex offender and murderer attacks in a terrifying rage. This predator evades capture for years, but leaves a critical piece of evidence behind - his palm print.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A massive explosion claims the life of a California farmhand, and authorities think it's an accidental death, but analysis of debris shows it's a bomb; investigators have few suspects until they hear ominous rumours about a jealous rage.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a beautiful college student is stabbed to death in her Knoxville apartment, suspicion immediately falls on her roommate; a bloody shoe print left by the killer exposes a murderer with no history of violence and no reason to kill.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Numerous suspects emerge after someone starts targeting law enforcement officers in a peaceful Texas county.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An Illinois mother and her two young children are brutally murdered in their beds, and lurid threats are spray painted all over the walls of the crime scene.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young Texas teenager and her boyfriend are brutally attacked on Valentine's Day; she is found dead while her boyfriend escapes; the case goes cold for nearly 50 years before a new forensic test exposes a family man with a dark secret.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Three Indiana construction workers are found shot on a work site.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A Texan who vows to live a reformed life after being released from prison is subsequently convicted of murder, despite insisting his innocence, so he uses forensic science from behind bars to try to prove his case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An extremely successful California career woman keeps falling ill and doctors can't determine why, then after she dies they still have no explanation until they find a key figure in her life has been lying about his past.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The body of a 24-year-old criminology student is found wrapped in a blanket alongside a desolate road in Brooklyn, N.Y.; police discover that the bouncer at a bar is her killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a 79-year-old woman is found shot to death in her home, investigators initially suspect her husband or a violent neighbour; shell casings recovered at the scene and a high-tech database reveal an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young single mother is abducted from a gas station and later found stabbed to death near an oil field; detectives use shoe and tire impressions to weed out numerous suspects and find the killer.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Blockbuster Bridge
programme.desc: In South Korea engineers are fighting against the forces of the wild West Sea to build the Incheon Grand Bridge. It’s part of a visionary plan to link the biggest airport in the nation, with a new international investment zone called New Songdo.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: Deep under the Swiss alps there is a light at the end of the world’s longest tunnel. This April, after twelve long years it will be completely cut end to end.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Big Bosphorus Dig
programme.desc: Weary commuters in Istanbul, Turkey must tough it out after the Marmaray Project is delayed four years by the discovery of the city's fourth century port with thirty-four ancient shipwrecks.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Power Generator
programme.desc: A three hundred and ninety ton giant on a daring journey: A team of German heavy-lift-specialists have to transport a generator from a disused coal plant to its new operation site 120 kilometers away.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Mining Truck
programme.desc: If a transporter needs to be transported, if 176 wheels aren't enough to carry its weight and if the load weighs twice as much as the transporter... Then it must be the mother of all mega transports!

programme.title: Mega Transports: Biggest Containership
programme.desc: When the first ship of the brand-new OOCL-fleet gets underway, more cargo is moved at one time than anywhere else in the world and ever before.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Giant Antenna
programme.desc: South America. The chelonian Atacama Desert is home to the world's largest radio telescope Atacama Large Millimeter Array Observatory, also known as ALMA.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Conveyance of the Norwegian Joy
programme.desc: Meyer Werft in Germany is one of the biggest shipbuilders in the world. But it's problem is as big as the ships it builds: the coast and sea are 50 kilometres away.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Siberian Ice Road
programme.desc: A Mega Transport on one of the most dangerous roads in the world. The Siberian Ice Road. It doesn't forgive mistakes. It's treacherous. And unpredictable.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Wind Park
programme.desc: A wind park needs to get from Europe to Asia. Over two thousand tons of highly sensitive and valuable cargo. On one of the world's largest heavy lift vessels.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Stolen Power
programme.desc: Twenty-five kilometers off the coast of Holland, a brave crew of construction workers struggles to erect sixty tall turbine-driven windmills in the wild North Sea. The giant blades of these monster machines will spin at 400 km per hour.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Crossing the Colorado
programme.desc: In a rugged canyon, just downriver from the Hoover Dam, a team of construction veterans is hard at work, building the biggest concrete-arch bridge on the continent.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Hard Rock Park
programme.desc: In Myrtle Beach, South Carolina a team of engineers have just one year to build the world’s first Rock and Roll theme park, Hard Rock Park.

programme.title: Mega Builders: London Olympic Aquatics Centre
programme.desc: A group of engineers in England and Wales has taken on the biggest challenge of the next Summer Olympic Games -- the construction of a complex steel-truss roof for the new Aquatics Centre.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Moving Mountains
programme.desc: With a price tag of 6 Billion American Dollars, The Gotthard Base Tunnel, between Lucerne and Milan, is a mega project by any standard.

programme.title: Mega Builders: King of Container Ships
programme.desc: 3000 shipyard workers build the World's Biggest Container Ship in the biggest little shipyard around, in Odense, Denmark.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Best Of
programme.desc: This season Mega Builders Vl will take viewers back to some of the most amazing engineering projects we’ve ever covered over the past five seasons to see them reach completion after years of hard work.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Suspension Bridges
programme.desc: Suspension bridges – impressively wide and stretched high over supporting cables or stay cables. The landscape-shaping icons: The superlative Golden Gate, Akashi Kaikyo, Aizaih, El Baluarte and Russky Bridge.

programme.title: Cops Uncut UK: Episode 15
programme.desc: With candid dashboard camera footage of bungled arrests, kamikaze crooks and cop-based carnage of all shapes and sizes, Cops Uncut is the ultimate American police trooper blooper reel.

programme.title: Wardens: Sturgeon Spearing
programme.desc: Michigan's District 3 is home to the state's only sturgeon spearing season. The limit is low, but the reward can be a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: Wardens: U.P. Snowmobile Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers in the U.P. have a lengthy snowmobile season to patrol. From sound checks to safe riding on trails, it's never a dull day in the snow.

programme.title: Wardens: Shining Surveillance Part 1
programme.desc: There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens: Shining Surveillance Part 2
programme.desc: There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens: First Day of Deer Season
programme.desc: Michigan hunters harvested the second most whitetails in the country. Keeping track of everyone in the field requires near 24/7 surveillance.

programme.title: Wardens: Illegal Blinds
programme.desc: Hunting blinds can not be left on state land year-round. When officers find blinds that need to be removed, they search high and low for the owners.

programme.title: Wardens: Bears in the U.P.
programme.desc: It can take 7 years to draw a bear tag in Michigan's U.P. Conservation Officers make sure everyone plays by the same rules, so no one has an advantage.

programme.title: Wardens: Westside Fishing
programme.desc: The westside of Michigan has some of the state's best fishing spots. From inland rivers to the Great Lakes, C.O.s know their fall will be spent watching anglers.

programme.title: Wardens: Best of: Michigan Whitetail Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan's archery deer season lasts 77 days and the regular firearm season is 16 days long. Over that time period, C.O.'s use a variety of tactics to make sure everyone is playing by the rules.

programme.title: Wardens: Pure Michigan
programme.desc: The state of Michigan is highlighted through a contest to win hunting licenses and over $4000 in prizes. Officers also patrol during a summer boating festival and the firearm deer season.

programme.title: Wardens: Detroit River Walleye
programme.desc: Conservation Officers patrol fishermen and women on the Detroit River, on the border between Michigan and Canada during the spring spawning run for walleye.

programme.title: Wardens: Autumn East to West
programme.desc: An officer on Michigan's east side meets a driver on the road without a license and an officer on the state's west side patrols during a waterfowl hunt on a state game area.

programme.title: Wardens: Man-Made Fires
programme.desc: Conservation Officers on patrols during fall fishing season as well as spring turkey season encounter suspects that have set fires in conditions where they shouldn't have.

programme.title: Wardens: Whitetail Patrol Tactics
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers employ numerous tactics to enforce the state laws. Some of them include using aerial patrols to look out for illegal activitity as well as keeping an eye out for blinds on state land that have been in place too long.

programme.title: Wardens: Whitefish Rodeo Part 1
programme.desc: Conservation Officers fish in plain clothes to see if anglers are snagging fish.

programme.title: Wardens: Whitefish Rodeo Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of a night time patrol to stop anglers from keeping fish that are foul-hooked.

programme.title: Wardens: Serving Warrants and Ice Fishing
programme.desc: Conservation Officers serve warrants to a suspect believed to have taken 18 deer without licenses

programme.title: Random Breath Test
programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: Random Breath Test
programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 5
programme.desc: A vehicle linked to drug dealing is on the run and evading police.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 6
programme.desc: PC Matt Turner is attempting to stop a vehicle with links to drug dealing in Macclesfield.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A young man (Taylor Lautner) must run for his life soon after learning that the folks who raised him are not his real parents.

programme.title: A Friend of the Family
programme.desc: A woman suspects her husband's business partner is responsible for a string of murders in their small town.

programme.title: Grace Is Gone
programme.desc: A man (John Cusack) takes his two young daughters (Shélan O'Keefe, Gracie Bednarczyk) on a road trip while searching for a way to tell them that their mother, a soldier, has been killed in Iraq.

programme.title: Major Movie Star
programme.desc: Popular actress Megan Valentine (Jessica Simpson) joins the Marines and is sent to boot camp, where she butts heads with gruff Sgt. Louisa Morely (Vivica A. Fox) and struggles to adapt to life without luxury.

programme.title: LOL
programme.desc: A teenager (Miley Cyrus) tries to deal with the pressures of high-school romance and friendship while dodging her overprotective mother (Demi Moore).

programme.title: Grace Is Gone
programme.desc: A man (John Cusack) takes his two young daughters (Shélan O'Keefe, Gracie Bednarczyk) on a road trip while searching for a way to tell them that their mother, a soldier, has been killed in Iraq.

programme.title: Major Movie Star
programme.desc: Popular actress Megan Valentine (Jessica Simpson) joins the Marines and is sent to boot camp, where she butts heads with gruff Sgt. Louisa Morely (Vivica A. Fox) and struggles to adapt to life without luxury.

programme.title: LOL
programme.desc: A teenager (Miley Cyrus) tries to deal with the pressures of high-school romance and friendship while dodging her overprotective mother (Demi Moore).

programme.title: Ride Like a Girl
programme.desc: Michelle Payne, first female jockey to win Melbourne Cup.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: Young Marine Cpl. Megan Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive combat dog that she trains. Together, they complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: Sanctuary: For King and Country
programme.desc: With Adam under tight security back at the Sanctuary, Magnus starts to process the events of the past 24 hours. She discloses to Will how she was associated with Adam back at Oxford in the late 1800s, and the turbulent role he played with The Five.

programme.title: Flash Gordon Conquers the Universe: The Death Mist
programme.desc: Flash Gordon, Dale Arden and Dr. Zarkov return to the planet Mongo for an antidote to the Purple Death, which wreaking destruction on Earth. However, Ming the Merciless has other plans for them.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Ashlocke is desperate to find a cure for his fatal condition and infiltrates the Sanctuary to blackmail Adam into getting hold of the antidote.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A military plane is shot down behind enemy lines, prompting the team to make a desperate bid to recover the secret government weapon hidden on board.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team sets out to save Brennan, who has become trapped inside an invisible town and is facing execution for a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Three extraterrestrials who pose a serious threat to humanity target Shalimar, so the team sets out to save her from their evil clutches.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A disembodied mutant takes over the bodies of various people and sets out to go after the ones who did this to him. One of them is a doctor that Shalimar likes.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: While on a job, Shalimar is injured and is helped by another feral mutant, Nikki, whom she knew and was almost chosen for the team. While Shalimar recuperates, she offers to fill in.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Second Chances
programme.desc: A Taelon program offers a transformation into a younger, healthier version of oneself. Liam fears that something more dangerous is also happening. Lili is worried that Doors' run for the presidency is negatively affecting the resistance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Payback
programme.desc: A mysterious death by poisoning creates questions about the safety of portal technology. When a Taelon is killed in the same manner, the investigation leads to a very smart scientist that even the Resistance was scared to work with.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: Paul Chandler plots an attack on the Taelon Embassy in DC with the ship he stole from Lili. He begs her to join him in beginning an all out war.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Volunteers
programme.desc: A group of Resistance capture a volunteer from a Taelon program for youth. Liam decides they may learn valuable information from her. They also decide to send in one of their own as a volunteer to see what the program is teaching.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Bliss
programme.desc: Lili is given a psychotropic drug called "bliss" via a Taelon device. They discover it is widespread. With an instantly strong addictive property, the addicts are dying within 48 hours. The investigation leads Liam and Sandoval to Ireland.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Highjacked
programme.desc: With a reporter on board, the Taelon mother ship is highjacked into interdimensional space. Liam is the prime suspect, causing an even bigger rift between Da'an and Zo'or. As the ship floats, lost in space, they must find the real culprit.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Defector
programme.desc: A shuttle crashes on a beach after being pursued by a second Taelon piloted shuttle. When Liam locates the survivor (a Taelon called Belleye), he claims to want to help the Resistance take back Earth from the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Heroes and Heartbreak
programme.desc: Augur is recruited by a Taelon weapons project, but the others are worried about his involvement. When the project is launched earlier than originally planned to fight a Jiridian fleet, the Earth is in danger.

programme.title: The Lost World: Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: A dying stranger issues a warning to three of the explorers, begging them to find a hunter named Pierson Rice. Roxton shares a common, painful past with the mysterious Rice.

programme.title: The Lost World: Dead Man's Hill
programme.desc: Roxton stumbles into a bizarre Wild West alternate reality when he finds his name on a tombstone. Roxton meets the other explorers' pioneer-town personas.

programme.title: The Lost World: Hollow Victory
programme.desc: Challenger experiments with a new fuel source in the hot-air balloon, and takes the other explorers along for a test ride. However, a storm drags the balloon into a dangerous underground world.

programme.title: The Lost World: A Witch's Calling
programme.desc: While Roxton and Malone search for the missing Veronica, two young witches lure them away from safety. Unbeknownst to the explorers, a sorceress and her disciples plot to destroy Challenger.

programme.title: The Lost World: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Malone is pierced by a poison dart from a Keeran blowdart. Under the influence of the hallucinogenic poison, Malone relives his nightmarish experience as a battlefield correspondent in WWI.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens : Origin of Humanity
programme.desc: Increasing evidence and sightings of UFOs suggest contact with extraterrestrial beings who may have influenced the origins of human life.

programme.title: Cover Ups Conspiracy: The Chinese Spy Balloon
programme.desc: Objects shot down in US/Canada airspace. Pentagon feigns ignorance. Alien involvement?

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: The Hidden Truth
programme.desc: This documentary charts the US government's involvement with UFO phenomenon from 1947 to the present day. Featuring rare classified footage, expert interviews, cover-ups and the revelation of a secret 20 million dollar UFO research program.

programme.title: The UFO Battle of Los Angeles
programme.desc: 1942 LA: A mysterious UFO causes blackout & artillery fire. Remains unexplained.

programme.title: UFO Hunters: The Italian Ufologists
programme.desc: Italian researchers explore mass UFO sightings, clipeology, and real testimonies, delving into the history and research methods of ufology.

programme.title: Alien Mind Control: The UFO Enigma
programme.desc: This fascinating documentary offers an unprecedented look at a group of individuals who claim to have had life altering UFO encounters, and discovers the unique psychic abilities they unknowingly share.

programme.title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction of the Century
programme.desc: Linda Napolitano's 1989 alien abduction is the abduction case of the century.

programme.title: Aliens Among Us: The Michael Wolf Theory
programme.desc: Michael K. Wolf shares 30 years of insights on UFOs, aliens, government projects, and crop circles.

programme.title: Confessions Of An Alien Abductee
programme.desc: Chantelle, Marie and Simon are all alien abductees. These ordinary people share their extraordinary stories as they seek help through the curiously named Anomalous Mind Management Abductee Contactee Helpline, or AMMACH.

programme.title: Aliens Against Nuclear War: Edgar Mitchell
programme.desc: 12 moonwalkers claim ET visited Earth, govt covered it up. Aliens stopped nuclear war. Crazy or worth hearing more?

programme.title: The Hills' Abduction: The Zeta Reticuli Incident
programme.desc: Barney & Betty Hill's abduction and the Zeta reticuli incident explored.

programme.title: Alien Reptilian Legacy
programme.desc: Researchers reveal the presence of a supreme and nefarious interdimensional intelligence that has been manipulating mankind for centuries. Interviews with experiencers and alien abductees expose a sinister agenda behind the alien presence on Earth.

programme.title: Project Serpo
programme.desc: 2005: Ex-agent unveils 3,000-page report on a secret ET exchange mission to planet Serpo

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Hayley's cheeky cartoon tattoo is threatening to derail her wedding plans. Mick wants to cover an X-rated inking that's causing embarrassment to his daughter. Dom's saucy camel is giving him the hump.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Sketch helps Sian cover a clown tattoo that's scaring the life out of anyone who sees it. Jay has to deal with Emma's extremely intimate cat portrait. Daz needs assistance covering a boastful tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Sketch rids Ben of a silly spooning tattoo. Jay fixes Matt's backside-based chat-up line.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay banishes Ant's backside buddy, and Alice helps Chelsea get over the shock of her life.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Emma needs Jay's help with a warning sign. Alice assists Louise with her eye-popping ink.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch meets Gaz, who has his best friend's initials in an intimate place, and the whole team are shocked by the cover-up he wants. Jay gives Lady Gaga superfan Harry the portrait of his dreams.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jay gives Ian a portrait that has to be seen to be believed and Alice covers Linsey's scar.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Alice gets her claws into dog-lover William's cover when he betrays his furry friends in ink. Emma disguises her tattooed equations after attempts to impress her maths teacher didn't add up.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jay gives leuan a tribute to his late sister, while Sketch evicts the eye on Mike's thigh.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Victoria is in desperate need of a tattoo cover-up so she can train as a teacher. Abigail gets inked at the age of 75, Hollie loses her cheeky chicken ink, and Lisa divorces a big tattoo mistake.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Love is in the air as Glen rids Riley of her Valentine's issues, Jay fixes Leon's bedroom problems, Alice works on Suzanne's cocky Cupid, and Sketch divorces Jordan from his tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Lou helps tomboy Lucy, who has a vulgar phrase tattooed on her leg. Skater boy Matt shows Sketch a tattoo in an unsightly place. Jay assists Amina, who thinks getting inked is worse than giving birth.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Nathan banishes his bad luck back tatt. Ollie's wheezy Magaluf inking is sent into orbit.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sketch meets Billy, whose habit of tattooing himself to impress ladies has got out of hand.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Harry wants a memorial tattoo dedicated to a very intimate part of himself after surviving testicular cancer. Matt has doodled on his own legs with a tattoo machine his parents got him for Christmas.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jay deals with a couple who are obsessed with going on holiday and getting cheap tattoos. Lou is busy sorting out Thom, who has arrived with a rude tribute to one of his friends on his rear end.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Sketch conceals a large portrait on Les. Alice spreads Becca's favourite food on her leg.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Ladies' man Ash needs help covering an embarrassing portrait of his beloved mum. Sean wants a cover for his leg tattoo of two dogs doing what comes naturally. Dancer Jay-Jay loses her X-rated tatt.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Explores a variety of off-road vehicles, including the modern Land Rover Defender. In addition, Titch Cormack travels to Cornwall to uncover the story behind the Second World War's Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to a secretive production facility in Sweden to look at the Koenigsegg Regera, a Swedish supercar. Titch Cormack lifts the lid on the world's first supercar, the Jaguar XK120.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Take a behind-the-scenes tour of Bugatti's production facility in Molsheim. Plus, Titch Cormack uncovers a luxury car from the 1920s: the Rolls Royce Silver Ghost.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A grand tour of the Ferrari Roma production facility in Northern Italy. Titch lifts the lid on an icon of the sixties, the series one Jaguar E-type.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: The armoured BMW X5 is the perfect hybrid of when armoured cars meet supercars. Titch Cormack reveals just what it takes to design and build a car that can come under enemy attack.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to the Croatian production facility of the Rimac C Two. Titch Cormack hits the jackpot when he discovers a barn full of a game-changing technically advanced Aston Martin Lagonda's.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: It's all about feeling the wind in your hair as the lid is lifted on the Pagani Huayra Roadster BC. Take a look behind the scenes at the production facility in Northern Italy with founder and Chief Designer Horacio Pagani.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Explores a variety of off-road vehicles, including the modern Land Rover Defender. In addition, Titch Cormack travels to Cornwall to uncover the story behind the Second World War's Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to a secretive production facility in Sweden to look at the Koenigsegg Regera, a Swedish supercar. Titch Cormack lifts the lid on the world's first supercar, the Jaguar XK120.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Take a behind-the-scenes tour of Bugatti's production facility in Molsheim. Plus, Titch Cormack uncovers a luxury car from the 1920s: the Rolls Royce Silver Ghost.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A grand tour of the Ferrari Roma production facility in Northern Italy. Titch lifts the lid on an icon of the sixties, the series one Jaguar E-type.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: The armoured BMW X5 is the perfect hybrid of when armoured cars meet supercars. Titch Cormack reveals just what it takes to design and build a car that can come under enemy attack.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to the Croatian production facility of the Rimac C Two. Titch Cormack hits the jackpot when he discovers a barn full of a game-changing technically advanced Aston Martin Lagonda's.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: It's all about feeling the wind in your hair as the lid is lifted on the Pagani Huayra Roadster BC. Take a look behind the scenes at the production facility in Northern Italy with founder and Chief Designer Horacio Pagani.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Explores a variety of off-road vehicles, including the modern Land Rover Defender. In addition, Titch Cormack travels to Cornwall to uncover the story behind the Second World War's Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Vatican Secret Archives is a treasure trove of history that is shrouded in secrecy. Jamie Theakston heads to Rome in a bid to gain access.
programme.sub-title: The Secrets of the Vatican Archives

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston exposes a secret unit who murdered Bulgarian dissidents. One victim, Georgi Markov, was famously killed with a ricin-tipped umbrella.
programme.sub-title: The Secrets of the Murder Bureau

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: A look at the different challenges faced by the orthodox beliefs about the order that angered much of Europe, especially France.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Truths of the Templars

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: A look at the life of Mary Magdelene, a key figure in Christianity who witnessed Jesus's crucifixion and resurrection after travelling with him.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Mystery still surrounds how fascist dictator Benito Mussolini met his end, before being hanged in Milan's Piazzale Loreto. Jamie Theakston seeks out answers.

programme.desc: Jamie Theakston uncovers more about the ruthless Johann Reichhart, a German state executioner who killed around 3,000 people during World War Two, many of them for resisting National Socialism.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu goes regal as he visits Royal Leamington Spa to prepare a feast for actor and comedian Guz Khan. In order to impress Guz, Zuu sets out to prepare both meat-based and plant-based dishes.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu is back home in London as he prepares to cook for comedian Phil Wang whilst he tours with his show. Eager to impress, Zuu's mum is enlisted to help make the perfect jollof rice.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys are back on the road heading to Cardiff to cook for American stand-up and actor Desiree Burch. She's in the Welsh capital with her new show, 'Desiree's Coming Early'.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu heads off to Hackney in East London in order to prepare a three-course meal for comedian Jamali Maddix. Along the way, he dives deep into the local delicacy that is jellied eels.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys are going international flying all the way to the Isle of Man to cook for comedian, Josh Widdicombe, who on his Bit Much tour. However, first they will need to source a new food truck on the island.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu heads to Soho to see if he can meet the culinary expectations of comedian London Hughes. To make his task even more interesting, London makes a £1,000 wager that he won't be able to impress her.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu takes his food van to Manchester in order to prepare a slap-up meal for comedian Ed Gamble. The fact that Ed is a self-confessed cheese lover gives Zuu plenty of options when it comes to deciding what to cook.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and sidekicks Tubsey and Hyder travel to the spa town of Bath in order to cook for comedian Lou Sanders. Providing an extra challenge is the fact that Lou is a committed vegan.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Christmas Eats
programme.desc: AJ Tracey, JME, Julie Adenuga and Loyle Carner chat around the dinner table while Zuu serves Big Zuu Bissap, a V-Gang Gobi Christmas Curry and a next level Christmas dinner.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Christmas Eats
programme.desc: Phil Wang, Desiree Burch, Ed Gamble and Rosie Jones return for more of Zuu's delicious eats but not before he takes them on some festive foraging.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Grime artist and self-taught chef Big Zuu travels to Croydon with his food truck and sidekicks Hyder and Tubsey to cook a meal that will impress Jimmy Carr just after he steps off stage.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu heads to Portsmouth to cook a meal for comedian Rosie Jones. Rosie is on tour and is desperate for some quality fish and chips. In an attempt to meet her expectations, Zuu goes out for a spot of fishing.
